description: Deletes the API key used for authentication. The API key to delete is determined from the authentication headers.

Retrieves the closed-only trading mode status for the authenticated user. When closed-only mode is enabled, the user can only close existing positions and cannot open new ones.
Revokes a builder API key. Uses POLY_BUILDER_* headers to revoke the authenticated builder's own key.
Retrieves all active builder API keys owned by the authenticated user. Requires Polymarket L2 Authentication.
Creates a new builder API key for the authenticated user. Requires Polymarket L2 Authentication. The owner is determined from the L2 authentication headers.
Derives an existing API key from an Ethereum address and nonce. The API key must have been previously created using the same address and nonce.
Retrieves the balance and allowances for the authenticated user's address. The address is determined from the API key authentication and signature type.

Checks if a specific order is currently scoring for rewards. An order is considered "scoring" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards: - The order is live on a rewards-eligible market - The order meets the minimum size requirements - The order is within the valid spread range - The order has been live for the required duration

description: Checks if multiple orders are currently scoring for rewards. An order is considered "scoring" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards: - The order is live on a rewards-eligible market - The order meets the minimum size requirements - The order is within the valid spread range - The order has been live for the required duration

summary: Get scoring status for multiple orders (POST)

An order is considered "scoring" if it meets all the criteria for earning maker rewards: - The order is live on a rewards-eligible market - The order meets the minimum size requirements - The order is within the valid spread range - The order has been live for the required duration

summary: Get user earnings and markets configuration
description: Returns an array of current rewards including user earnings and live percentages per market for a provided day. Results are paginated (100 items per page by default). Use next_cursor to fetch subsequent pages. A next_cursor value of "LTE=" indicates the last page. Requires CLOB L2 Auth headers. Optional features: - Search by question/description using the `q` parameter - Filter by tag slugs using `tag_slug` parameter (multiple values are OR'ed) - Filter by favorite markets using `favorite_markets=true` - Sort by various fields using `order_by` and `position` parameters

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to current date if not provided.

description: Sends a heartbeat signal with session tracking via heartbeat ID. The first request should include an empty or initial heartbeat_id. The response will contain a new heartbeat_id that must be used in subsequent requests. If the provided heartbeat_id doesn't match the expected value, the request will fail. If heartbeats are not sent regularly, all open orders for the user will be automatically canceled. This is useful for automated trading systems that need to ensure orders are canceled if the system becomes unresponsive.

query_params.name: timePeriod
query_params.description: Time period for leaderboard results

query_params.name: orderBy
query_params.description: Leaderboard ordering criteria

query_params.name: limit
query_params.description: Max number of leaderboard traders to return

query_params.name: offset
query_params.description: Starting index for pagination

query_params.name: user
query_params.description: Limit leaderboard to a single user by address

query_params.name: userName
query_params.description: Limit leaderboard to a single username

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: The condition ID of the market to query positions for

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter to a single user by proxy wallet address

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter positions by status. - `OPEN` — Only positions with size > 0.01 - `CLOSED` — Only positions with size <= 0.01 - `ALL` — All positions regardless of size

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort positions by: - `TOKENS` — Position size (number of tokens) - `CASH_PNL` — Unrealized cash PnL - `REALIZED_PNL` — Realized PnL - `TOTAL_PNL` — Total PnL (cash_pnl + realized_pnl)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of positions to return per outcome token

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset per outcome token

description: Returns all relayer API keys for the authenticated address. Auth allowed: Gamma auth or Relayer API key auth (`RELAYER_API_KEY` + `RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS`).

parameters.name: RELAYER_API_KEY
parameters.description: Relayer API key (when using relayer API key auth)

parameters.name: RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS
parameters.description: Address that owns the key (when using relayer API key auth). Must match the address that owns the key.

header_params.name: RELAYER_API_KEY
header_params.description: Relayer API key (when using relayer API key auth)

header_params.name: RELAYER_API_KEY_ADDRESS
header_params.description: Address that owns the key (when using relayer API key auth). Must match the address that owns the key.

description: Submit a transaction request to the Relayer. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.

summary: Get recent transactions for a user
description: Gets the most recent transactions submitted to the Relayer, owned by a specific user. Authenticated using Builder API Keys or Relayer API Keys.
